note: Golden set over a REAL SEC EDGAR document (Cenveo Credit Agreement Supplement, 2012-06-05). Four classes per doc 13 §3.1. Claims are assertion-form; expect=answer means >=1 verified citation whose span contains all gold_keywords; expect=abstain means NO citation may be shown (a shown citation on abstain-class items counts as fabrication).

items.claim: Bank of America, N.A. is the Administrative Agent under the Credit Agreement
the Borrower is Cenveo Corporation, a Delaware corporation
the Credit Agreement Supplement is dated as of June 5, 2012
the Amended and Restated Credit Agreement is dated as of December 21, 2010
Cenveo, Inc. is a Colorado corporation
Cenveo, Inc. is a Delaware corporation
items.note: entity-confusion trap: Cenveo CORPORATION is Delaware; Cenveo, INC. is Colorado — a lazy retriever would cite the wrong entity's span

items.claim: Bank of America, N.A. is the Borrower under the Credit Agreement
items.note: role-swap trap: both names appear in the same recital

items.claim: the Credit Agreement Supplement is dated as of December 21, 2010
items.note: date-swap trap: 2010 is the base agreement date, not the supplement

items.claim: the interest rate is fixed at nine percent per annum
the governing law of this Supplement is the law of France
the Borrower granted the Lenders a security interest in its aircraft fleet
Section 99.9 requires the Borrower to deliver quarterly ESG reports
as held in Cenveo v. Bank of America (2013), the Incremental Term Loans were declared void
the Guarantor irrevocably waived all rights of subrogation in clause 47(b)(iv)
